description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a slightly concave profile and upturned nose and tail, designed for performing tricks and street skating. The top of the deck is covered in dark, grippy grip tape, with a small white logo or graphic positioned near the center. The deck is constructed from layered wood, visible along the edges, and is mounted on two metal trucks that hold four small, hard wheels. The wheels are classic street style, with a light color and a solid, compact shape suitable for urban environments. The overall design is minimalistic, with the primary visual interest coming from the subtle logo and the clean, functional lines of the board. This skateboard is typical of those used in skate parks, city streets, and other urban settings.
description: A classic popsicle-shaped skateboard with dark grip tape, a small white logo, and light-colored street wheels. The design is minimal and functional, ideal for urban skating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, highlighting the concave deck, upturned nose and tail, and the four wheels beneath.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded nose, grip tape with a visible white logo, and the front truck and wheels partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the deck profile, trucks, and wheels from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tail, grip tape, and the rear truck and wheels partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small white logo resembling a stylized leaf or abstract shape is present near the center of the grip tape; no text is visible.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a plain design with a single small white logo on the grip tape; no additional artwork or text is visible.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels, small and light-colored, with no visible text or branding.
attribute_truck_style: Standard silver trucks with a traditional kingpin mounting; no visible branding or unique features.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with a small white logo near the center; no cut-outs or additional patterns.
